title: orbea marginata
intro: Orbea marginata, also known as the Spitting Star or Star Cactus, is a rare, nocturnal succulent species native to the semi-arid regions of Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to induce vomiting, as it contains toxic compounds that can be used to treat certain health conditions. Orbea marginata has been used to treat various health issues, such as indigestion, nausea, and fever, due to its purgative and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve using its latex to create tinctures or infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments, although its use should be approached with caution due to its toxicity.
